name: rd-flywheel
description: Deterministic capability-gap governance through MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, and OS scheduling.

interface.shortDescription: 证据约束的能力缺口闭环运行时
interface.longDescription: Receive frozen capability-gap events, preserve original checkpoints, coordinate allowlisted evidence-only adapters, enforce independent production evidence, and resume the original workflow through one deterministic controller shared by MCP, Skill, CLI, and OS scheduling.
defaultPrompt: 运行研发飞轮预检并列出能力缺口
重试已补齐依赖的能力缺口事件
验证研发飞轮审计哈希链
